chapter_title.en: The Reward for the Ziyārah of Ĥusain (a.s.) Is Equal to the Reward for Performing a Hajj and an ‘Umrah

text: 10 وَ بِإِسْنَادِهِ عَنِ الْعَبَّاسِ بْنِ عَامِرٍ عَنْ أَبَانِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو خَلَّانَ [أَبُو فُلَانٍ] الْكِنْدِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ (ع) قَالَ مَنْ أَتَى قَبْرَ الْحُسَيْنِ (ع) كَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَهُ حِجَّةً وَ عُمْرَةً

en.sayyid-mohsen-al-husayni-al-milani: 10. My father narrated to me from Sa’d ibn ‘Abdillāh, from Ḥasan ibn ‘Ali Al-Kūfi, from ‘Abbās ibn ‘Āmir, from Abān ibn ‘Uthmān, from Abī Khallān Al-Kindi, who said: Abū ‘Abdillāh (Imam Sādiq (a.s.)) said: Allāh will register the reward of a Hajj and an ‘Umrah for those who go to (the Ziyārah of) the grave of Ḥusain (a.s.).
